cms.task_text: Bloky pro velké písmeno I (100px) jsou [hlp]rozhozeny[/hlp]. Sestavte správně.
cms.start_blocks_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_forward" x="20" y="20"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field></block><block type="turtle_pen_up" x="190" y="20"></block><block type="turtle_backward" x="360" y="20"><field name="DISTANCE">40</field></block><block type="turtle_right" x="20" y="130"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block><block type="turtle_pen_down" x="190" y="130"></block><block type="turtle_forward" x="360" y="130"><field name="DISTANCE">100</field></block><block type="turtle_left" x="20" y="240"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block><block type="turtle_pen_up" x="190" y="240"></block><block type="turtle_backward" x="360" y="240"><field name="DISTANCE">40</field></block><block type="turtle_pen_down" x="20" y="350"></block><block type="turtle_forward" x="190" y="350"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field></block></xml>
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_forward" x="50" y="50"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_up"><next><block type="turtle_backward"><field name="DISTANCE">40</field><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_down"><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">100</field><next><block type="turtle_left"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_up"><next><block type="turtle_backward"><field name="DISTANCE">40</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_down"><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
